programme.title: Way Back Home
programme.desc: A newlywed couple comes to their new home, with new hopes and dreams. However, one day a phone call to the wife resurfaces the incident that caused trouble to the family ten years ago.

programme.title: The B Side
programme.desc: The host leads conversations exploring current trends in sports, fashion and entertainment; she delves into diverse aspects of popular culture with leading personalities.

programme.title: The Ghost Bride
programme.desc: A woman is offered wealth and a comfortable life for her loved ones if she will agree to participate in strange ritual.

programme.title: Nandito Ako Nagmamahal Sa'Yo
programme.desc: Tata is delighted to find his long-lost father and live with his family again, but the reunion is disturbed when he falls in love with a girl who is betrothed to his stepbrother.

programme.title: Ang Siga At Ang Sosyal
programme.desc: A rich girl and a poor boy fall in love amidst a dispute over land owned by her family, which is occupied by squatters including him.

programme.title: Abel Villarama: Armado
programme.desc: Abel begins a love affair with Christina, his boss's daughter, but her treacherous suitor learns about it and frames him for a crime.

programme.title: Singles
programme.desc: A single mother, a clueless bombshell and a woman attracted to wealth each search for a different kind of Mr. Right.

programme.title: Computer Kombat
programme.desc: Pen and Dong are obsessed with playing a video game. When Master Tyson takes notice of this, he comes alive from the game to annihilate the world.

programme.title: Four Sisters and a Wedding
programme.desc: Three sisters reunite to dissuade their younger brother from marrying his fiancée. As they interact, they face the feelings and issues they have kept buried for a long time.

programme.title: Corpus Delicti
programme.desc: A police officer sets out on a dangerous mission to solve his brother's mysterious disappearance. Despite the struggles, he is determined to bring his brother's case to justice.

programme.title: I Love You to Death
programme.desc: When a woman's birthday wish for true love comes true, it comes with some strange and unexpected consequences.

programme.title: Pamahiin
programme.desc: Ghosts follow a couple (Dennis Trillo, Iya Villania) home after they visit a funeral parlor to pay their respects to a deceased friend.

programme.title: Princess Dayareese
programme.desc: Romance blossoms after a princess offers her look-alike a large amount of money to switch places with her.

programme.title: Four Sisters and a Wedding
programme.desc: Three sisters reunite to dissuade their younger brother from marrying his fiancée. As they interact, they face the feelings and issues they have kept buried for a long time.

programme.title: The Prenup
programme.desc: Wendy meets Sean on board a plane and the two start to fall in love. When they return to the Philippines with plans to get married, their parents bicker about a prenuptial agreement.

programme.title: Iyo ang Hong Kong, akin ang Manila!
programme.desc: A Manila policeman is sent to Hong Kong to find a gun smuggler. He enlists the help of another policewoman and a martial arts expert to track down the smuggler who escapes back to Manila.

programme.title: Sugatang Puso
programme.desc: A man and his second wife are forced to take in his difficult son from his previous marriage. When the son and the wife's son get involved in a car accident, life drastically changes.

programme.title: Sinungaling Mong Puso
programme.desc: Jason, a young man who is dissatisfied with his marriage, has a passionate affair with Clara, an older woman. Their tryst eventually becomes proof that love makes people do strange and unexpected things.

programme.title: Pido Dida 3: May Kambal Na
programme.desc: Pido and Dida are madly in love and lead an enjoyable life. However, things take a turn when Dida conceives and delivers twins.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Separation From Lilia Cuntapay
programme.desc: A professional horror movie extra prepares for her first ever acting award nomination.

programme.title: Amang Capulong - Anak ng Tondo II
programme.desc: Amang's heart is filled with revenge due to the hatred caused by the deaths of his loved ones. As he brings the perpetrators to justice, he earns the moniker "Son of Tondo.".

programme.title: Kuya
programme.desc: A group of teenagers live happily with each other. Things take a turn when one of the teen's cousins enters their lives and creates problems for them.

programme.title: Oda sa wala
programme.desc: A woman struggles to keep her family-owned funeral home afloat.

programme.title: Top Chef S16
programme.desc: The day has come when the final four chefs must cook with the world's smelliest fruit durian. This infamous fruit is a delicacy in Macau, but will Padma and guest judge, James Beard Award winner Abe Conlon be able to stomach their creations for the season's last Quickfire? Then, the chefs get a tutorial in the traditional cuisine of Macau, a fusion of Chinese and Portuguese flavors, and are joined by their family members from back home. For the elimination challenge, the chefs are tasked with blending their own heritage with Chinese flavors in order to impress their love ones and the judges, in order to earn their spot in the finale.

programme.title: The Exclusive: Beat The Devil's Tattoo
programme.desc: When a journalist discovers that his exclusive story on a serial killer was based on false information, he fabricates more lies to cover his mistake.

programme.desc: A surgeon’s dying wish is to see his lover who had died in an accident long ago. He receives pills that allow him to travel back in time and tries to save her. There, he also meets his younger self.

programme.title: One Win
programme.desc: Woo-jin is the newly appointed manager of a girls' volleyball team which is going to disband. The new owner sold all ace players for money and asked the team to win at least once.

programme.desc: Two rival detectives compete against each other to catch the notorious killer who shakes up Korea by their gruesome murders.

programme.title: Cart

programme.title: The Long Way Home
programme.desc: During the Korean war, a South Korean soldier, is ordered to deliver a classified document but gets attacked and loses it. A clumsy North Korean solider picks it up, and they eventually meet at the western front.

programme.title: Usury Academy
programme.desc: Kang-jin is bullied as the lowest-ranking boy at school with no presence and money. He starts a business on private loans by chance and soon rises to the top of the school hierarchy.

programme.title: Pilot
programme.desc: Han Jung-woo. a star pilot suffers a drastic fall due to a momentary mistake was blacklisted from all airline. In a desperate bid for survival, he adopts a new identity as his younger sister and manages to find re-employment, yet this newfound stability is soon threatened...

programme.title: The Moon
programme.desc: An astronaut is left stranded in space because of an accident during a spaceflight. The former director of the space centre strives to bring him home safely...

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Clockwork Mouse leaves Carlton in charge of getting everything ready for the Builders' Parade. Carlton gratefully accepts Noddy's offer of help but doesn't want the Naughticorns helping too! But when Carlton goes to the Brickabuild Store for supplies, he's horrified to discover the store is empty. How will they get the parade ready now? And will Clockwork Mouse ever trust Carlton again? Noddy sets out to investigate: Who took all the stuff from the Brickabuild Store?

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy accidentally get turned teeny-tiny when one of Mercat's potions spills. To get back to their normal size, they need to find the right ingredients to make a grow potion, which means going on an itty-bitty search through the dollhouse! For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's Purrsday, the happiest cat day of the year, and all the Gabby Cats have a special purrsday surprise. Gabby and Pandy make peekaboo kitty paper chains with Baby Box, decorate a Purrsday cake with Cakey, Gabby gets a special kitty makeover with Mercat, and everyone sings a Purrsday song with DJ Catnip. For the COTD, DJ Catnip shows us how to make a DJ Catnip purr-stick!

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop enlist Cruz’s help to perform a dance for Mom’s birthday. Though it’s hard at first, they learn to put their dolphin, unicorn, and narwhal powers together to create something special. / Kelp, Pixie, Ollie, and their friend Leroy try to help Juniper understand her angry feelings.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Scallop is afraid of her first “tuskist” appointment. Kelp helps her get through it with a song. / Fog rolls in, threatening Kelp’s first Three Moon Festival in Unicorn Land. Kelp and his friends use a combination of unicorn spark and the Kelp Way to create a new festival.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: With a new family moving to town, Mayor Sniffington wants Pawston to look perfect. Tag and Scooch offer to help, but it's too many chores to do on their own, so Tag builds a robot to help. But when Frank and Beans catch wind of the robot, they try to swipe it so that it will do their personal chores. \ When Tag learns that Pawston's new fire chief is a cat, she leads a welcoming effort with the dogs of Pawston. But when their attempts to welcome Tom and Kit Whiskerton go awry, Tag realizes it's because they're only doing things that dogs would enjoy.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: When Tag and Scooch get a once-in-a-lifetime chance to learn magic from Muttfield, Tag cannot wait to be the star of the end-of-class show. When Scooch outshines Tag with his natural gift for magic, Tag gets jealous and attempts a master level trick that goes awry. \ The dogs are shedding their winter coats and it's the day of the big Pawston Picnic. But when Spike alerts the Barkers that there's an incoming windstorm, it's up to Spike and Tag chase the storm while the Barkers try to convince the dogs of Pawston to go inside!

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: When the Dinotrux settle together in the crater, D-Structs decides to go after their most important resource: the Reptools.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: Determined to save her family home, Lucky signs up to race as a wild card in Rosemead's elite Junior Cup. But winning it all won't be easy.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: Grug tries to solve the mystery of where Munk's family is /Eep refuses to join in when Ahhh! Valley celebrates their first holiday, “Howl Day”

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: After rescuing Kevin and almost having a first kiss, Eep sets up dangerous situations to recreate the moment; Grug and Snoot go on a rescue/mission

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Fireworms invade Dragon's Edge, while Ruffnut and Tuffnut discover that they have an unexpected connection to the island.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: As a Rumblehorn wreaks havoc on Dragon's Edge, Hiccup seeks the help of Stoick – who forms an unexpected bond with the rampaging beast.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Blade tells Po the truth about Alfie. The group chases after Klaus and Veruca in an epic snowy mountain chase, culminating in Po saving Blade’s life as the weasels take off with the gauntlet and the whip. Rukhmini reveals that she actually has the real whip in her staff, and she knows where to go to get the next one: India.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: The team arrives in India where an old friend of Rukhmini can supposedly give them a pendant that will lead to the next Tianshang weapon. But when they arrive, they find that Rukhmini’s hometown has changed a lot in the thirty years she’s been gone, and her old friend Diya might not be willing to help them.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Easter-time in the dollhouse! When Gabby unboxes an Easter basket with an orange egg inside, all the Gabby Cats want to know what’s inside, but when CatRat accidentally sends it rolling out of Kitty Fairy’s garden, Gabby and Pandy go on a springtime search through the Dollhouse to find it. Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: There's a mystery in the dollhouse! When things start to mysteriously disappear around the dollhouse, Gabby and Pandy play detectives, using all their senses to find clues, follow them, and solve the mystery. For our COTD segment, CatRat and Baby Me-Owls show us how to make ice cube paints!

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Boss Baby is framed for leaking info about the Stinkless Serum to PuppyCo and must flee on the run via Errand Day with the family

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Frederic makes a play to take over the town's babysitters by instituting "senior sitting"

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: When Frederic Estes creates the cutest plushy ever that is the hottest toy in town, the field team must destroy the last remaining one but are powerless against its cuteness

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: When Krupp transfers to another school, George and Harold follow, only to find a bizarro version of Jerome Horwitz Elementary, where the teachers are nice and the kids are well-behaved. But no one's having any fun! George and Harold want to right this wrong with pranks and comics. But Krupp enlists Mr. Neamer (bizarro Meaner), who then super-enlargers his brain and becomes Brainy Blabulous, in order to stop the subversion of authority.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: In order to spice up their field trip to Romeinday (an ancient Rome reenactment park), George and Harold trick Melvin into turning the bus into a time machine so they can travel to actual ancient Rome and be gladiators. After offending Caesar with their comic, the emperor is accidentally turned into Cruelius Sneezer and pursues the school group with all his might.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: In honor of Dump Day in Piqua- celebrating the creation of the dump - George and Harold try to earn extra credit by creating a trash-alanche. But Melvin creates an invention to suck all the trash into another dimension. The plan backfires when Tubbadump, a trash-covered monster, emerges from that dimension for revenge on the trashmakers.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Echo and Ms. Nowhere bust Cisco, Frostee, and Gary out of their cell. But Rafaela has already mind controlled Tony and Layla and taken them to drive for her in the favela race, allowing her to release her mind control formula on the crowd!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Our team battles Rafaela’s mind-controlled crowd. They soon discover that Rafaela’s true plan is to steal the spy plane. Tony deduces that Rafaela isn’t doing all of this for the money - she’s doing it for family.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Cleve Kelso breaks Rafaela Moreno and a dangerous, cybernetic prisoner named Matsuo Mori from a high-security ice prison. Back in LA, Tony and the crew experience a major shake-up when Echo gets accepted to Ms. Nowhere’s spy training but Tony is rejected. While Tony is grappling with his identity crisis, Echo struggles to survive spy school, and Ms. Nowhere and Gary disappear in a massive North African storm during their hunt for Cleve. Echo must lead the Toretto crew and finish Ms. Nowhere’s mission – what could Cleve be up to in the desert?

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When the Twins journey to the Northern Markets to fix their prized mace, they end up stumbling onto a secret project by Viggo and the Dragon Hunters.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: A huge storm hits Dragon's Edge causing the Dragons to spook and run off but when Astrid is blinded, Hiccup must lead her to Stormfly.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Hiccup doesn't know who to trust when Viggo and Ryker each tell him that the other has gone rogue, and is sidetracked when a new dragon attacks.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: As the countdown to the Eternal Night approaches, Jim is enlightened in the truth about himself.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Jim's friends discover the Trollhunter has gone through a transformation, Jim will test his newly gained abilities.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: The Eternal Night covers Arcadia in shadow leading to a long awaited fight between the Trollhunter and Gunmar130226

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: A mysterious figure helps Po escape the guards, so Po makes his way to a desert market, determined to prove Blade wrong for leaving him behind. But when he accidentally stumbles into Klaus and Veruca, he and Blade awkwardly reunite while giving chase, and work through their differences. But the mysterious figure has followed Po and tries to capture them, clearly a new threat to our team.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: With a map from the comic book, Po and Blade make the treacherous journey through the desert to the lost city, and once inside they find the guardian of the fire whip, Rukhmini. The mysterious figure, a stag named Colin, forges an uneasy alliance with Klaus and Veruca.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: In order to earn the fire whip, Po and Blade have to get themselves and Rukhmini out of a lost city with no exits, but Rukhimi’s not exactly who she says she is. Our villains’ alliance shatters when Colin realizes the weasels are mages with magical powers, and he leaves Klaus gravely injured.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja and Krel travel into their parents’ memories in pursuit of Morando – and the truth about Gaylen’s Core. But when the King and Queen’s lives are jeopardized, a trusted ally makes a sacrifice that will change the team forever.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: With their parents nearly regenerated and Morando in pursuit of Gaylen’s Core, Aja, Krel, and Vex unite with Toby and Arrgh on a quest into the depths of Trollmarket to unearth the relic before it ends up in the wrong hands.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Armed with the power of Gaylen's Core, Morando's forces attack Arcadia as the Royals fight to protect their lives and their adopted Earth home.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Ms. Nowhere tells the kids that the failed mission is over, but Tony isn’t ready to give up, and he’s determined to rescue Frostee. The crew goes rogue by deciding to steal the final key from Shashi and trade it for their friend.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Shashi finally reveals his master plan.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The kids battle Shashi in Las Vegas as Shashi tries to take down evil billionaire Cleve and use Skeleton Key to create a new world order. Frostee has a plan to get Skeleton Key offline, but it only gives Tony ten seconds to take Shashi out and save the world.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony and his crew have been working as spy racers in LA for a while now and are itching to go international. Whey they discover a mysterious man with a strange tattoo of a formula in a smuggling ring bust, Ms. Nowhere finally agrees to let them go to Rio to investigate the tattoo and the whereabouts of one of her agents who has gone dark - Layla Gray.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Ms. Nowhere drops the kids off in Brazil and leaves to go on her own important mission, but things immediately go south for Tony and his crew. When the hauler and gear gets caught in quicksand, Tony needs to learn that a good leader knows when to accept help.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Frog didn't croak. Frog sang like a bird… and the birds didn't like it. Birds were the masters of song and that's the way it should be! So the birds trick poor old Frog into a singing duel and sing and sing and sing… until poor old Frog's voice is reduced to a rebbit. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Spider didn't have a tiny waist. She was all big and round… and did she like her food! One day greedy Spider hears of Four Feasts in Tinga Tinga and she wanted to go to them all! So she spun four threads and attached them to various animals going to the feasts. But the Monkeys, Frog, Hippo and the Bees all set off in different directions – North, South, East and West – and Spider's thread soon runs out. EEeeek! The threads get tighter and tighter and tighter, making Spider's smaller and smaller and smaller! Luckily the threads break, but from that day on Spider has always had a tiny waist. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: Pat has a very special delivery today! Micawber's claws need clipping and Pat needs to deliver not only the claw clippers but Amy the vet too! On the way to the lighthouse though they encounter all sorts of animals needing help today – from a poorly Bonnie with a cold to a fretful Pumpkin who doesn't want to take his horse pills! Meanwhile, poor Micawber's claws are so long and he's so upset by getting them tangled up in things like Chris's scarf and the lighthouse tablecloth that he flies out of the window, carrying the tangled lighthouse keys in his claws! Chris tries to get them back and finds himself locked out of the lighthouse altogether! Luckily, Pat and Amy arrive in the SDS helicopter. Pat lowers Amy down to Micawber who is perched on top of the lighthouse and she's soon able to clip his claws and retrieve the keys. Phew! Well done Amy and well done Pat!

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: Pat and Jess are called to Cardiff to collect a new sorting machine when the Pencaster machine breaks down. Whilst they negotiate with Rowena Roberts, the Cardiff sorting office manager, as to how to move the heavy machine onto the SDS plane, Ben is fighting his own battles at the Pencaster office as his merry band of “helpers” from the village cause more chaos in their attempts to sort the post!After a quick tour of Gilbertson Castle, Pat and Jess manage to get the new sorting machine to Pencaster just in time to deliver a missing birthday present to Meera. Happy Birthday Meera – and well done, Postman Pat!

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Christine (Big Chris' mum) is visiting Silver hatch. As is Mamma Mia… serious competition ensues!

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Tin Top is feeling homesick so Big Chris tries to cheer him up. But who could that pesky varmint causing trouble on the track be?!

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Maxi is jealous of all of James' gadgets, or more precisely, the attention the other cars give him. He persuades Molecom to devise some gadgets for him… with hilarious results

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Mr Carburettor has commissioned a bust of himself for Silver Hatch. Disaster strikes when it is dropped, Big Chris tries to make amends, while Marsha distracts Mr Carburettor and the reporter

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: It's time for the Toyland football match but the game can't go ahead until Noddy finds the missing players. Noddy discovers that someone misdirected Pat Pat and Deltoid so that they'd miss the match. Noddy finds the missing players and reunites everyone at the real football pitch but then Hoof disappears. Noddy discovers that Hoof misdirected the others because he wanted to be the best player. Hoof learns that football is a team sport where all the team members need to work together to make it the best game ever. Well done Noddy!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Noddy's about to play a game of basketball with Big Ears and Deltoid when he realizes that the hoop has been fiddled with. Who could've done that and why? Noddy's investigation leads him to Fuse, who explains that he just wanted to help the toys that weren't as skilled as him. Everyone practises and realises that the best way to improve at sport is to keep practising. Well done Noddy.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Farmer Tom is confused and upset when he finds all his trees and corn knocked over. Noddy decides to investigate: who spoiled Farmer Tom's crops? He soon discovers lots of strange heavy bags scattered all over the farm. Whose are they? Where did they come from? And what could they possibly have to do with Smartysaurus's new hot air balloon?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: The Head Builder isn't happy. Someone's been playing with the builders' stuff and now their pulley doesn't work. Noddy decides he needs to find out who did it before anything else goes wrong. Who broke the Builders' pulley?

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes... Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! Cakey welcomes his Cousins to the dollhouse and leads them through a fun-filled itinerary of activities, but quickly realizes his cousins have an agenda of their own. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Aggro is embarrassed about big changes she's going through. And when she gets stuck in a volcano, the Rescue Riders seek help from ... Magnus?

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: When a mama Ironclaw dragon gets caught high on a mountain with a broken wing, Hannahr the blacksmith has to confront her fear of heights to help out.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Donna's delivery truck breaks down, it's up to the crew to help Donna continue delivering packages to Harmony Harbor's residents. / When the crew takes on a mission to rescue a lost pet, Ellie must face her fears in order to help save the day.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: While helping Lola pack for her first day of camp, the Dews get stuck inside her backpack! Using the random items inside, the Dews get crafty in their attempt to break out. / When Eden and Phoebe join Harper and Marcus for a playdate, the Dews disagree on what activity their kids should do, ultimately learning that there are lots of ways to play!

programme.title: Death Forest 5
programme.desc: People begin to see the creepy white face monster Yoshie in Shibuya.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time In China 3
programme.desc: Master Wong and his disciples enroll in the 'Dancing Lion Competition' to stop an assassination plot and to battle an arrogant, deceitful opponent.

programme.title: The Cursed: Dead Man'S Prey
programme.desc: A mysterious serial murder cases take place by jaechaui (dead bodies which have risen from the dead and able to talk). These bodies are manipulated by someone.

programme.title: Horns
programme.desc: In the aftermath of his girlfriend's mysterious death, a young man awakens to find strange horns sprouting from his temples.

programme.title: The Room
programme.desc: Matt and Kate buy an isolated house. While moving, they discover a strange room that grants them an unlimited number of material wishes. But since Kate has had two miscarriages, what they long for the most is a child.

programme.title: Boyka: Undisputed 4
programme.desc: An underground fighter fights brutal matches to protect the widow of a man he unintentionally killed in the ring.

programme.title: Septembers of Shiraz
programme.desc: Prior to the Iranian revolution it was a place where people of all religions were allowed to flourish. This is the story of a prosperous Jewish family who abandon everything before they are consumed by the passions of revolutionaries.

programme.title: Whispering Corridors 6: The Humming
programme.desc: Strange things happen in the closed toilets of Eunhee's old school, after they heard a humming sound echoing in the toilet, even when no-one else was present. Is the mystery linked to Eunhee's visual and auditory hallucinaions?

programme.title: Armour of God 2
programme.desc: A treasure hunter is hired to help the UN find Nazi gold hidden in Sahara

programme.title: Antibirth
programme.desc: In a desolate community full of drug-addled Marines and rumors of kidnapping, a wild-eyed stoner named Lou wakes up after a wild night of partying with symptoms of a strange illness and recurring visions as she struggles to get a grip on reality while stories of conspiracy spread.

programme.title: Ashfall
programme.desc: When the stagnant volcano on Baekdu suddenly erupts, A group from across the Korean peninsula was formed to prevent another eruption that may destroy the whole Korea

programme.title: Unlocked
programme.desc: A CIA interrogator is lured into a ruse that puts London at risk of a biological attack.

programme.title: Honey Sweet
programme.desc: A successful sweets developer and a loan company spam caller begin sharing a taste of life they never knew exsisted.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold (S9)
programme.desc: Summer temperatures at an all time high disrupt the seafloor, causing miners to find new strategies. Shawn fights a legal battle.

programme.title: Belly Of The Beast Bigger And Bloodier
programme.desc: Join Dr. Austin Gallagher and his fearless team as they deploy a 29-foot whale decoy to attract and study massive great whites in New Zealand.

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen (S2)
programme.desc: Jared counts on a new driver to boost production at the Forever Claim and keep John Mohammed’s hands off Float Camp.

programme.title: Building Off The Grid (S6)

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen (S1)

programme.title: ABC News At Noon - Episode 84
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.title: Australian Story - Episode 11
programme.desc: In 2026, Logie-award-winning documentary program Australian Story celebrates 30 years sharing compelling stories about real people that illuminate, entertain and inspire. The power of the personal. Presented by Leigh Sales.

programme.title: Great Australian Walks - The Bay Trail
programme.desc: Susie Youssef goes to the Bay Trail in Melbourne, from bustling St Kilda to Brighton's iconic beach boxes.

programme.title: Roads Unknown India - Episode 6
programme.desc: Jess and her ride crew navigate the stunning but rugged Konkan Coast, switching between bikes and boats. The team race toward Mumbai, determined to get Pulak to the city in time to visit his family.

programme.title: Gardening Australia - Episode 10
programme.desc: Inspiring, entertaining and full of practical advice, join Costa Georgiadis and the team as they unearth gardening ideas, meet avid gardeners and look at some of the most inspiring gardens from across the country.

programme.title: Landline - Episode 10
programme.desc: A tasty sampler of stories from the land - covering food, agriculture, crops, climate, business and innovation - as we meet the fascinating people who make our rural and regional communities unique. Presented by Pip Courtney.

programme.title: Planet America - Episode 13
programme.desc: Trump's presidency steamrolls into its second year and a deeply divided America celebrates its 250th birthday. US voters will go to the polls for the midterm elections - will Republicans hold on to their majority in Congress?

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien - Episode 84
programme.desc: Joe O'Brien brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: A Bite To Eat With Alice - Donna Hay
programme.desc: Food icon Donna Hay is in the house and it's all lemons all the time with a delicious fettuccine followed by a dessert that is a guaranteed dinner party showstopper.

programme.title: Muster Dogs: Where Are They Now - Episode 4
programme.desc: Lisa's journey concludes as she pays one last visit to fan favourites Zoe and Buddy, full-time mum and grazier Cilla and Ash, the resilient duo Joni and Chet, and season 1 alumni Aticia and Gossip and CJ and Spice. (Final)

programme.title: ABC National News - Episode 118

programme.title: The Bridge Malaysia/ Singapore S2 - EP 5
programme.desc: A body is left on the border of Singapore and Malaysia. Two investigators, one from each country, must work together to catch a killer bent on highlighting social problems that they think are plaguing people on both sides of the border.

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune S42 - EP 125

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights - EP 55
programme.desc: When Yanna quits the restaurant after confessing her role in its sabotage, the gang hires an unexpected new helper — a robot vacuum — and Salim’s relationship with Nina is exposed to the public.

programme.title: (Live) News Tonight
programme.desc: The daily evening-news programme featuring highlights and coverage of both local and international news with a local perspective.

programme.title: Long Weekends - EP 5
programme.desc: We're headed to the lesser known part of Thailand - Hat Yai for this week on Long Weekends! Get ready for a mix of food adventure, nature hikes, speakeasy and not forgetting to make a stop at a local perfume shop to customise a new scent for perfume girly - Ann Nicole! Will we be able to keep within the 600 budget? Watch on and find out!

programme.title: Scene City: Codetta
programme.desc: Can you rekindle a memory through music? Elle, a pianist tutor in her late teens, was taken aback and at a loss when her latest student, Madam Yeow, an elderly woman, seems to be suffering from dementia. How do you teach a skill set to someone who is suffering from memory loss? Despite her condition, the lesson continued - Madam Yeow would not be able to recognise Elle during the lesson, and Elle would simply return and start all over again.

programme.title: Quantum Leap S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Set 30 years after Dr. Sam Beckett stepped into the Quantum Leap accelerator and vanished, follows a new team that must restart the project hoping to understand the mysteries behind the machine and its creator.

programme.title: Watson S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: Ingrid's lies come back to haunt her when her sister Gigi needs to be treated by the team after she develops side effects to the secret treatments Ingrid put her through. Also, Watson and Mary bond over a tragedy.

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights - EP 55
programme.desc: When Yanna quits the restaurant after confessing her role in its sabotage, the gang hires an unexpected new helper — a robot vacuum — and Salim’s relationship with Nina is exposed to the public.

programme.title: Joy of Life 2 - EP 36 庆余年 2
programme.desc: The drama continues from the first season of the Joy of Life trilogy, following the story of Fan Xian as he gains a stronghold in the court to eventually overthrow Emperor Liu Yu.

programme.title: Travel with Mommy - EP 5 带阿母去旅行
programme.desc: Top Hosts Jason Yeoh & Jack Lim create priceless mother-son memories, on a journey of love to check off their moms' travel wish lists. Join them in HK, Malaysia & Singapore on customised vacations.

programme.title: The Ultimatum - EP 7 双子星
programme.desc: Zheng Wen Yu was pregnant when she was taken advantage of by her boss Ye Song Nian, the CEO of Phoenix Corporation. Both Wen Yu and Song Nian's wife gave birth to daughters in the same hospital. As fate will have it, the hospital made a mistake and swapped the babies. Because Wen Yu's daughter was diagnosed with congenital heart disease, she kept silent about the mistake so that her daughter can receive the best medical care with Song Nian's wealth.

programme.title: The Ultimatum - EP 8 双子星
programme.desc: Zheng Wen Yu was pregnant when she was taken advantage of by her boss Ye Song Nian, the CEO of Phoenix Corporation. Both Wen Yu and Song Nian's wife gave birth to daughters in the same hospital. As fate will have it, the hospital made a mistake and swapped the babies. Because Wen Yu's daughter was diagnosed with congenital heart disease, she kept silent about the mistake so that her daughter can receive the best medical care with Song Nian's wealth.

programme.title: Golden City - EP 477 多情城市
programme.desc: This drama is set in the Jiufen area from the 1960s to the 1970s. It tells the story of how three brothers conquered the world with their bare hands. Through the love story of the previous generation, it connects the common emotions between the two generations depicting the memories and in-depth exploration of the differences in values between them.

programme.title: Forbidding No More - EP 2 极境之旅
programme.desc: Iran, Cuba or North Korea are not exactly the most accessible countries. In fact most would balk at the idea of holidaying there. Stringent visa requirements and hard travel conditions are but some factors. But are they really inaccessible? "Forbidding No More" takes us to these countries to explore what culture and attractions these locations have to offer.

programme.title: News Tonight 晚间新闻
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Healing Heroes - EP 121 医生不是神
programme.desc: Patients entrust their health and lives to doctors, but doctors are human too, how do they learn to shoulder the weight of these lives? Journey with four young aspiring junior doctors into our first medical longform drama, where they learn to grow with senior specialists, as they face life and death and overcome challenges on their way to become professional doctors...

programme.title: Kid U Not - EP 1 孩是老的辣
programme.desc: At a class reunion, the seemingly wealthy Chris hides her bankruptcy from her classmates, Yutong lies about a happy family life and Manle hides his illness and death of a family member—all for pride’s sake. When they expose a scam and stumble upon a teahouse, they are offered a special tea by its owner Miss Golden that will let them to relive and change their lives.

programme.title: Talk of The Town - EP 20 狮城热话
programme.desc: A half-hour talk-show segment in Hello Singapore which brings together diverse voices and expert opinions to thought-provoking discussions on wide range of issues. Incorporating online polls which gather public opinions, the segment creates a space that allows for multi viewpoints in the studio from Monday to Friday.

programme.title: Heroes in White - EP 4 侠医
programme.desc: Yingchen is forced to take over the sale of an old shophouse and unexpectedly runs into Weimin there. He treats her ankle injury again and reveals his interest in buying the property, while Qiting, upon learning his identity, plans to secretly snatch the deal.

programme.desc: After going missing, Yingyin helps a wheelchair-bound girl, Zhou Jingzhi, which leads Yingchen to meet Jingzhi’s grandmother, Chen Jinjü. Meanwhile, Weimin discovers information about Jinjü through his mother Deng Shuhuan’s belongings and learns that she is the owner of the shophouse.

programme.title: Le Grand Tour de Osaka - EP 1 Grand 住去大阪
programme.desc: C Kwan takes Samantha Ko and Luk Ho Ming to Osaka and Kyoto, enjoying luxury hotels, hot springs, scenic train rides, antique treasures, and fine dining experiences.

programme.title: Tuesday Report : Encounter Under The Stars - EP 5 星期二特写 星空下的邂逅
programme.desc: In 1985, a group of Xinyao singers went to Taiwan to record Tomorrow will be better, which inspired them to establish Ocean Butterflies Music, marking Xinyao’s move toward professional production. With the copyright systems, Xinyao travelled overseas and was known to Hong Kong and Taiwan singers. The Xinyao Festival and Sing Music Awards discovered new talents. Supported by the labour movement, Xinyao spread widely into everyday life.

programme.title: Kid U Not - EP 2 孩是老的辣
programme.desc: The trio transform into their former 12-year-old selves. Chris is still cocky, Manle lazy and Yutong lonely. Chris’ cousin Alex and Manxin get off to a bad start due to a dispute between their families. Her parents’ divorce and pressure from her grandparents weigh on Yutong, who finally breaks down when Chris damages her treasured keychain.

programme.title: Legend of the Female General - EP 36 锦月如歌

programme.title: White Cat Legend - EP 1 大理寺少卿游
programme.desc: The story is set in the divine capital under the rule of the Empress. During a grand night banquet at the Tang Palace, Li Bing, who is favored by the Empress, is appointed as the Vice Minister of the Ministry of Justice. In the Ministry of Justice, Chen Shi, Wang Qi, Alibaba, Cui Bei, and Sun Bao, under the leadership of the new Vice Minister, the White Cat Li Bing, work together to clear the layers of mystery surrounding the divine capital.

Both Wen Yu and Song Nian's wife gave birth to daughters in the same hospital. As fate will have it, the hospital made a mistake and swapped the babies. Because Wen Yu's daughter was diagnosed with congenital heart disease, she kept silent about the mistake so that her daughter can receive the best medical care with Song Nian's wealth.

programme.desc: Meet the M family! Mani, the wide-eyed father and Mages, his bossy wife, are aliens masquerading as humans on Earth, trying to comprehend and study human behavior. Their son, Maran, meets a group of lovable misfits at school while their rebellious daughter, Mangai, feels alienated being the only human in the family. Join this oddball family in Ayalaan - Out of this World on a whimsical journey of understanding the complex beings that are humans!
